summary: This role is a strong fit for your preference for predictable daytime hours and the ability to disconnect fully after shifts, as it avoids the high-pressure analytical reasoning and math-heavy tasks you find challenging. The clinical framework provides the procedural structure you excel at, though you will need to navigate the creative and interpersonal demands of the work. While the career is sustainable regarding work-life balance, you must remain mindful of the physical strain and emotional labor required to prevent long-term burnout.
